name: woodpecker
description: Generated TGG ruleset: woodpecker CST <-> Hub-IR. Bidirectional — the engine derives CST->IR and IR->CST from this one set (model a).

rules.name: R_woodpecker_agent_user_comment
rules.documentation: woodpecker: user `# foo` comment under agent <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_woodpecker_concept_trigger_branch_match
rules.documentation: woodpecker: concept `trigger_branch_match` via path `when.branch.include` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=branches]

rules.name: R_woodpecker_concept_trigger_cron
rules.documentation: woodpecker: concept `trigger_cron` via path `when.cron` <-> hub:pipeline -has_trigger-> hub:trigger.attr[name=schedule]
